title: Morita equivalence classes of principal blocks with elementary abelian defect groups of order 64
journal: Proceedings of Krasovskii Institute of Mathematics and Mechanics UB RAS (2020)
journal_ref: Proceedings of Krasovskii Institute of Mathematics and Mechanics UB RAS (2020)
abstract: We classify the Morita equivalence classes of principal blocks with elementary abelian defect groups of order 64 with respect to a complete discrete valuation ring with an algebraically closed residue field of characteristic two.
comment: 20 pages, 1 figure. Presented at the 2020 Ural Workshop on Group Theory and Combinatorics
